name: chart-bar-mixed
visual_summary: Bar chart component with mixed series, suitable for displaying combined data in a visual and easy-to-understand format. Use this component when you need to compare progress or values across different categories. It's particularly effective in dashboards or reports.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready graph component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-bar-mixed
Description: Bar chart component with mixed series, suitable for displaying combined data in a visual and easy-to-understand format. Use this component when you need to compare progress or values across different categories. It's particularly effective in dashboards or reports.
Style: e.g. light, compact, modern
Interactions: e.g. hover, animated
Tags: data visualisation, bar chart, mixed series, comparison

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
